sections.title: If the player is carrying a Combat path voucher and hasn't received all possible rewards yet

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have this voucher for completing the combat Adventure Path, it says to come talk to you about claiming my Adventure Path reward.

lines.speaker: Aubury
lines.text: Why yes, here are some air and mind runes.

lines.speaker: Aubury
lines.text: I do have more rewards for you, but you need to be on a members world for me to give you the reward. Maybe there is something else I can help you with.

lines.speaker: Aubury
lines.text: I do have more rewards for you, but you need to be on a members world for me to give you the reward. Maybe there is something else I can help you with.

sections.title: If the player isn't carrying a Combat path voucher or is carrying a Combat path voucher and has received all possible rewards already

lines.speaker: Aubury
lines.text: Do you want to buy some runes?

lines.speaker: Aubury
lines.text: Certainly! Skillcapes are a symbol of achievement. Only people who have mastered a skill and reached level 99 can get their hands on them and gain the benefits they carry.

lines.speaker: Aubury
lines.text: The Cape of Runecrafting has been upgraded with each talisman, allowing you to access all Runecrafting altars. Is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Aubury
lines.text: Well, if you find someone who does want runes, please send them my way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, it's a rune shop. No thank you, then.

lines.speaker: Aubury
lines.text: Well, if you find someone who does want runes, please send them my way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you teleport me to the Rune Essence?

lines.speaker: Aubury
lines.text: Of course. By the way, if you end up making any runes from the essence you mine, I'll happily buy them from you.
